horoscope: Relationships may not flow as smoothly as you'd like today, dear Aries, but in all likelihood, this is a temporary timing problem in your interactions. Problems or challenges related to your social life can weigh heavily on you now, and they can interfere somewhat with your personal or family life and even with the words you use to express yourself today. It's better not to read too much into problem areas now unless they stick, so give things and people time. Pay attention to what emerges today and then take steps to release tension. Anything that relieves stress is useful now and, as the day advances, easy to find.

While conversations seem light on the surface today, dear Taurus, there can be some tense undercurrents. The root of the tension is something you should explore, and it's likely to be about future concerns, ambitions, or competition. It's a good idea to keep a check on your communications today, but especially as the day advances, you're likely to make the most of things. Leadership qualities or abilities are prominent, and you're happy to create winning situations. Pursuing your personal interests comes naturally, even with your larger focus on your wider goals and ambitions. You might be able to apply creative ideas to business and practical matters, with strong results.

Tensions arising today are unlikely to be about what they appear to be on the surface, dear Gemini, with your ruling planet, Mercury, forming an awkward angle with Pluto. Convincing others to address the root of a problem may be tricky, but not impossible! You might encounter some tense power dynamics with others, or someone may be feeling threatened or insecure and can act out as a result. While you could be unproductive right now as you focus on the less important things, priorities will be easier to see shortly. Fortunately, a connection between Uranus in your sign and the Moon today provides you with a nice jolt of psychic energy.

Interactions can be a little strained in spots today, dear Cancer, if insecurities drive behaviors. Others may seem hard to reach or disinterested when, in reality, they may only be self-absorbed and dealing with their own concerns. Feelings are more complex and complicated than usual, or they're simply more difficult to verbalize. Try to avoid getting into arguments over trivial matters, and becoming upset over a small detail. Mercury's awkward aspect to Pluto suggests two separate pulls: one toward light, easy thoughts, and communication, and the other toward digging up the truth of a matter. This can leave you undecided, but if you let go of one, you'll be in a better place. You may be looking for the meaning behind others' behavior more than usual.

There can be misunderstandings or tense undercurrents with someone today, dear Leo, as Mercury and Pluto form an awkward aspect. Attempt to keep things light and straightforward, but don't entirely avoid the deeper issues, particularly if they are the same old patterns that keep emerging. Being there for someone in need can give you a wonderful feeling, however. Later today, ideas are interesting and hopeful, and you're relating on creative terms. With the Moon's move into your solar seventh house today, you're inclined to seek ways to balance your life, as you tend to look at your life from someone else's or an objective perspective.

With today's Mercury-Pluto transit, dear Virgo, aim to stay centered and focused rather than allow others' dramas to throw off decision-making. Depending on how you approach the day, you can get a lot done or you can spend too much time on activities that don't amount to much. Concerns about or ambitions related to health, duties, and work can impact your social activities. As much as you want to do it all, you may benefit from some delegation of tasks or help from others. Gather your thoughts and formulate your plans. You're emotionally tuned into problem areas today, and if you work this tendency to your advantage, you can accomplish quite a bit.

This is not an ideal day for new beginnings or requests, dear Libra, but rather a day for troubleshooting and edits. There can be misunderstandings or poor timing that make relating to one another a little strained. Do your part by resolving not to take things too personally if things are slightly off. Personal problems may interfere with business choices or communications with the outside world. Career matters are a little complicated, but also quite fresh and exciting. As well, as the day advances, people receive you well. You can benefit greatly from identifying areas of your life that you've outgrown or that have been weighing you down.

You can be excited about sharing your thoughts, ideas, or beliefs these days, dear Scorpio, and they can be very inspiring. However, watch for power plays and a tendency to dwell today. While giving something further thought is just fine, try to shake it off if it's truly interfering with your day. Alternatively, you can find a way to act upon your feelings and beliefs, even in a small way, so that you can feel you're actually going somewhere with it. In truth, you can come up with something very special that will need fine-tuning later. The Moon heads into your sector of home and family, and you tend to seek out familiar faces, places, and activities. You're taking your need to relax, rest, and get comfortable more seriously now.

Decisions revolving around ownership, money, or knowledge can be challenging to come by today, dear Sagittarius. Today has a "two steps forward, one step back" energy to it, as there can be a sense of progress, with some regret or back-stepping. While you should answer to your desire to know yourself and the important people in your life more deeply, consider that you might be focusing on things that don't truly matter in the long run in some spots today. Your ability to adapt to minor changes helps you. With the Moon's move into your solar third house, you tend to multitask and follow your curiosity. As the day advances, you're ready to take on a challenge and make the best of your circumstances. You're enterprising and optimistic.

You're beginning to seek some predictability and familiarity today, dear Capricorn. Practical rather than emotional matters tend to take up more space in your mind today. You could have flashes of insight about a partnership today, but power dynamics can be tricky. You're inclined to hash things out to get to the bottom of problem areas. Nervous tension might get the best of you, but don't let it. It's better not to overcommit so that you have some freedom to explore your options. While energies for communicating are a bit complicated today, you nevertheless can find outlets for expressing yourself, and they can be very satisfying.

This can be an exciting day for ideas about how to handle chores, work, or health endeavors, dear Aquarius. There could be innovative ways to handle health or mechanical problems, but the trick will be to focus long enough to build a realistic plan. Keep in mind that irritability or tension due to increased demands from others can be an issue today, so be sure not to add more to your plate. Watch for unnecessary worry, as it's only productive when it motivates you to take action to fix a problem. Beyond that, you're wasting energy, so be kind to yourself and channel your energy into happier, more satisfying pursuits. The Moon moves into your sign today, and you’re drawing attention. There can be a feeling of emotional re-awakening within you.

You might notice that people seem to be harping on problem areas or scrambling to take control of situations today, dear Pisces, but have trouble managing if and when they do. Interactions can be a little strained as a result. Do your best not to take things too personally if interactions are awkward and to avoid staying in a state of limbo for too long. Instead, aim to focus on productive pursuits. This isn't the most decisive of days, but it may be best to defer important decision-making until you feel surer of yourself. The Moon heads into your privacy sector, and you may need some time to regroup and collect yourself.
